mapper.sql: id , instrument_id, esc_rel_id, type, start_time, end_time, temperature, humidity, before_status, after_status, user, time,task_id,task_code,parallel
mapper.insert: insert into test_instrument_use_record (id, instrument_id, esc_rel_id, type, start_time, end_time, temperature, humidity, before_status, after_status, user, time,task_id,task_code,parallel) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{instrumentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{escRelId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{temperature,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{humidity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{beforeStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{afterStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{user,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT} , #{taskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{parallel,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into test_instrument_use_record
id,
instrument_id,
esc_rel_id,
type,
start_time,
end_time,
temperature,
humidity,
before_status,
after_status,
user,
time,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{instrumentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{escRelId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{temperature,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{humidity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{beforeStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{afterStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{user,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update test_instrument_use_record
instrument_id = #{instrumentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
esc_rel_id = #{escRelId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
temperature = #{temperature,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
humidity = #{humidity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
before_status = #{beforeStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
after_status = #{afterStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user = #{user,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
time = #{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update test_instrument_use_record set instrument_id = #{instrumentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, esc_rel_id = #{escRelId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, temperature = #{temperature,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, humidity = #{humidity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, before_status = #{beforeStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, after_status = #{afterStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user = #{user,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, time = #{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT t3.task_code, t1.start_time, t1.end_time FROM test_instrument_use_record t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t2 ON t1.esc_rel_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_task t3 ON t2.task_id = t3.id WHERE t1.instrument_id = #{deviceId} AND t1.end_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startTime}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ORDER BY t1.start_time

SELECT id, instrument_id, esc_rel_id, type, start_time, end_time, temperature, humidity, before_status, after_status, USER, time FROM test_instrument_use_record t1 WHERE t1.instrument_id = #{deviceId} AND t1.start_time < STR_TO_DATE( #{startTime} , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' ) AND t1.end_time > STR_TO_DATE( #{startTime} , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' ) UNION ALL SELECT id, instrument_id, esc_rel_id, type, start_time, end_time, temperature, humidity, before_status, after_status, USER, time FROM test_instrument_use_record t1 WHERE t1.instrument_id = #{deviceId} AND t1.start_time < STR_TO_DATE( #{endTime} , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' ) AND t1.end_time > STR_TO_DATE( #{endTime} , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' )

SELECT t1.id recordId, t2.CODE instrumentCode, t2.NAME instrumentName, t2.model instrumentModel, t4.task_code taskCode, CONCAT( t6.product_name, "（", t3.check_item_name, "）" ) checkItem, t1.temperature, t1.humidity, t1.start_time startTime, t1.end_time endTime, t1.type, t1.USER, t1.before_status beforeStatus, t1.after_status afterStatus FROM test_instrument_use_record t1 LEFT JOIN test_instrument t2 ON t1.instrument_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t3 ON t1.esc_rel_id = t3.id LEFT JOIN test_task t4 ON t3.task_id = t4.id LEFT JOIN test_product_item t5 ON t3.check_item_id = t5.check_item_id LEFT JOIN test_product t6 ON t5.product_id = t6.product_id
t1.instrument_id = #{instrumentId}
and t4.task_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskCode},'%')
and t2.code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{instrumentCode},'%')
and t2.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{instrumentName},'%')
and t1.start_time >= STR_TO_DATE( #{startTime}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' )
and t1.end_time <= STR_TO_DATE( #{endTime}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' )
order by t1.time desc
SELECT CONCAT( CODE, NAME, model ) FROM test_instrument WHERE id = #{instrumentId}

SELECT id AS recordId, instrument_id AS id, esc_rel_id AS escRelId, task_id AS taskId FROM test_instrument_use_record WHERE id IN
#{item.recordId}

SELECT t1.id, t1.instrument_id, t1.esc_rel_id, t1.type, t1.start_time, t1.end_time, t1.temperature, t1.humidity, t1.before_status, t1.after_status, t1.USER, t1.time, t1.task_id, t2.task_code FROM test_instrument_use_record t1 LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t1.task_id = t2.id WHERE instrument_id = #{instrumentId} AND end_time IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT id, instrument_id, esc_rel_id, type, start_time, end_time, temperature, humidity, before_status, after_status, USER, time, task_id, task_code FROM test_instrument_use_record WHERE instrument_id = #{instrumentId} AND start_time < STR_TO_DATE( #{startTime} , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' ) AND end_time > STR_TO_DATE( #{startTime} , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' )
select * from test_instrument_group where instrument_id = #{instrumentId} limit 1
select count(*) from test_instrument_group where state = 1 and instrument_id = #{instrumentId}
select sum(parallel) from test_instrument_group where instrument_id = #{instrumentId}
mapper.insert: insert into test_instrument_group (instrument_id, user, task_id, task_code, state, parallel,esc_rel_ids) values (#{instrumentId},#{user},#{taskId},#{taskCode},#{state},#{parallel},#{escRelIds})

insert into test_instrument_group (instrument_id, user, task_id, task_code, state, parallel,esc_rel_ids) values
(#{item.instrumentId},#{item.user},#{item.taskId},#{item.taskCode}, #{item.state},#{item.parallel},#{item.escRelIds})

insert into test_instrument_use_record (id, instrument_id, esc_rel_id, type, start_time, end_time, temperature, humidity, before_status, after_status, user, time,task_id,task_code,parallel) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.instrumentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.escRelId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.temperature,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.humidity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.beforeStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.afterStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.user,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.taskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.parallel,jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.select: SELECT t1.instrument_id, t1.start_time, t1.end_time, sum( t1.parallel ) parallel, #{parallel}-sum( parallel ) sampleSize FROM ( SELECT instrument_id, start_time, end_time, task_id, ROUND( AVG( parallel ) ) parallel FROM test_instrument_use_record WHERE instrument_id = #{id} and DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{startTime}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') and DATE_FORMAT(end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{endTime}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') GROUP BY start_time, end_time, task_id ) t1 GROUP BY t1.start_time, t1.end_time ORDER BY t1.start_time
SELECT * FROM test_instrument_use_record WHERE instrument_id = #{id} AND start_time = #{startTime} AND end_time = #{endTime} limit 1
SELECT * FROM test_instrument_group WHERE instrument_id = #{instrumentId} AND task_id = #{taskId}
